creator: paulf@free.fr
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #3)

I would add that LDFLAGS (or some other linker variable) is the appropriate variable for libraries. CPPFLAGS is entirely inappropriate - this is for preprocessor flags. CFLAGS and CXXFLAGS are the standard variables for C and C++ compilation.

Also, isn't libgcc just a symlink to libcompiler_rt?
